---
title: "R/Pharma Hangouts"
description: |
  The R/Pharma Hangouts (hosted by Eric Nantz & Jared Woolfolk) feature key innovators across the world of open source and life sciences to go hands-on with key R packages, applications, or entire workflows highly relevant to the life sciences industry. You can view the recordings of past Hangout sessions below! 
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, author, date, image]
  image-align: left
  page-size: 5
comments: false

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
